prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: Alright, you've got this! It's normal to feel a bit anxious about tackling a tough task, but remember, you're more capable than you think. You've already shown resilience just by deciding to take this step today. Break it down into manageable pieces and focus on one small goal at a time. Trust in your abilities, and remember that every effort you put in moves you closer to your goal. Take a deep breath, give it your best shot, and don’t forget to give yourself credit for tackling it head-on. You're stronger than your excuses, and this task will be behind you before you know it. Go get it!
